sentence: 这本书的版式设计简洁又美观。
pinyin: Zhè běn shū de bǎn shì shè jì jiǎn jié yòu měi guān.
english: The layout design of this book is clean and attractive.

sentence: 这款应用的开发者每周都会更新版本。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn yìng yòng de kāi fā zhě měi zhōu dōu huì gēng xīn bǎn běn.
english: The developer of this app releases updates every week.

meaning: quota; limit (upper or lower); to set a quota; to set a limit
sentence: 每张信用卡每月都有消费限额。
pinyin: Měi zhāng xìn yòng kǎ měi yuè dōu yǒu xiāo fèi xiàn é.
english: Every credit card has a monthly spending limit.

sentence: 买火车票需要实名购票。
pinyin: Mǎi huǒ chē piào xū yào shí míng gòu piào.
english: Buying train tickets requires real-name registration.

meaning: to translate and edit; translator-editor; (computing) to compile (sour
sentence: 他修改完代码后重新编译了程序。
pinyin: Tā xiū gǎi wán dài mǎ hòu chóng xīn biān yì le chéng xù.
english: After finishing the code edits, he recompiled the program.

sentence: 这个地区气候属于大陆性气候，冬冷夏热。
pinyin: Zhè ge dì qū qì hòu shǔ yú dà lù xìng qì hòu, dōng lěng xià rè.
english: The climate of this region is continental — cold winters and hot summers.

meaning: system for identifying users (on a rail network, the Internet etc)
sentence: 网上注册账号要遵守实名制规定。
pinyin: Wǎng shàng zhù cè zhàng hào yào zūn shǒu shí míng zhì guī dìng.
english: Registering an online account must comply with the real-name system requirements.

sentence: 今天气温创下了今年入夏以来的新高。
pinyin: Jīn tiān qì wēn chuàng xià le jīn nián rù xià yǐ lái de xīn gāo.
english: Today's temperature hit a new high since the start of summer this year.

meaning: random thoughts; (in book titles etc) impressions; jottings
sentence: 他在日记里记下了旅途中的随想。
pinyin: Tā zài rì jì lǐ jì xià le lǚ tú zhōng de suí xiǎng.
english: He jotted down his random thoughts from the journey in his diary.

meaning: develop; make full use of; to carry on
sentence: 我们要发扬团队合作的精神。
pinyin: Wǒmen yào fāyáng tuánduì hézuò de jīngshén.
english: We should carry forward the spirit of teamwork.

sentence: 这款香水是专门为男士设计的。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn xiāngshuǐ shì zhuānmén wèi nánshì shèjì de.
english: This perfume is designed specifically for men.

sentence: 这台显示器的屏幕很大很清晰。
pinyin: Zhè tái xiǎnshìqì de píngmù hěn dà hěn qīngxī.
english: This monitor has a large, very clear screen.

sentence: 走廊的照明太暗，容易摔跤。
pinyin: Zǒuláng de zhàomíng tài àn, róngyì shuāijiāo.
english: The hallway lighting is too dim and it's easy to trip.

meaning: 1. to last; 2. to take (time); 3. period; 4. diachronic
sentence: 这栋大楼的建设历时三年终于完工了。
pinyin: Zhè dòng dàlóu de jiànshè lìshí sān nián zhōngyú wángōng le.
english: The construction of this building took three years and is finally complete.

meaning: 1. to formulate; 2. enunciation; 3. to explain sth precisely
sentence: 他把自己的想法清楚地表述出来了。
pinyin: Tā bǎ zìjǐ de xiǎngfǎ qīngchǔ de biǎoshù chūlái le.
english: He articulated his ideas clearly.

sentence: 几位富豪联手投资了这个项目。
pinyin: Jǐ wèi fùháo liánshǒu tóuzīle zhège xiàngmù.
english: Several wealthy tycoons joined hands to invest in this project.

sentence: 这项改革推进时遇到了很大阻力。
pinyin: Zhè xiàng gǎigé tuījìn shí yùdào le hěn dà zǔlì.
english: This reform faced a lot of resistance when it was being pushed forward.

sentence: 这家公司主要做货运业务。
pinyin: Zhè jiā gōngsī zhǔyào zuò huò yùn yèwù.
english: This company mainly handles freight transport.

sentence: 医生今天才确诊他得了肺炎。
pinyin: Yīshēng jīntiān cái quèzhěn tā déle fèiyán.
english: The doctor only confirmed today that he has pneumonia.

sentence: 公司的服务器遭到黑客攻击，数据泄露了。
pinyin: Gōngsī de fúwùqì zāodào hēikè gōngjī, shùjù xièlòu le.
english: The company's servers were attacked by hackers and data was leaked.

sentence: 这套陶瓷餐具是她从景德镇买回来的。
pinyin: Zhè tào táocí cānjù shì tā cóng Jǐngdézhèn mǎi huílái de.
english: This set of ceramic tableware was bought by her from Jingdezhen.

meaning: to investigate and handle (a criminal case)
sentence: 有关部门已对此事进行查处。
pinyin: Yǒuguān bùmén yǐ duì cǐ shì jìnxíng cháchǔ.
english: The relevant department has already investigated and handled this matter.

sentence: 我姑姑每年春节都来我们家。
pinyin: Wǒ gūgu měi nián Chūnjié dōu lái wǒmen jiā.
english: My aunt (father's sister) comes to our house every Spring Festival.

sentence: 她喜欢穿宽松的衣服，感觉舒服。
pinyin: Tā xǐhuān chuān kuānsōng de yīfu, gǎnjué shūfu.
english: She likes wearing loose clothes because they feel comfortable.

meaning: 1. police department; 2. police station; 3. abbr. of 警察局
sentence: 他去警局报告了丢失钱包的事。
pinyin: Tā qù jǐngjú bàogào le diūshī qiánbāo de shì.
english: He went to the police station to report his lost wallet.

sentence: 这家酒店刚获得了五星评级。
pinyin: Zhè jiā jiǔdiàn gāng huòdé le wǔ xīng píngjí.
english: This hotel just received a five-star rating.

sentence: 消费者可以通过投诉渠道维权。
pinyin: Xiāofèizhě kěyǐ tōngguò tóusù qúdào wéiquán.
english: Consumers can defend their rights through complaint channels.

sentence: 农业机械化大大提高了生产效率。
pinyin: Nóngyè jīxièhuà dàdà tígāo le shēngchǎn xiàolǜ.
english: The mechanization of agriculture has greatly increased production efficiency.

sentence: 我的信用卡额度不够，付不了款。
pinyin: Wǒ de xìnyòngkǎ édù bùgòu, fù bu liǎo kuǎn.
english: My credit card limit isn't enough to make the payment.

sentence: 他把三分之一的工资存起来了。
pinyin: Tā bǎ sānfēnzhīyī de gōngzī cún qǐlái le.
english: He saved one third of his salary.

sentence: 这部电影讲的是黑帮之间的斗争。
pinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng jiǎng de shì hēibāng zhījiān de dòuzhēng.
english: This film is about the conflict between criminal gangs.

meaning: 1. to enjoy (i.e. have the use or benefit of)
sentence: 大家围坐在一起享用丰盛的晚餐。
pinyin: Dàjiā wéi zuò zài yīqǐ xiǎngyòng fēngshèng de wǎncān.
english: Everyone sat together to enjoy a lavish dinner.

meaning: 1. to send to multiple recipients; 2. mass mailout; 3. to occur in a c
sentence: 他群发了一条新年祝福消息。
pinyin: Tā qúnfā le yī tiáo xīnnián zhùfú xiāoxi.
english: He sent a New Year's greeting message to multiple recipients.

sentence: 这次影展吸引了很多观众。
pinyin: Zhè cì yǐngzhǎn xīyǐn le hěn duō guānzhòng.
english: This film festival attracted a large audience.

sentence: "互联网"的缩写是"互联网"。
pinyin: "Hùliánwǎng" de suōxiě shì "hùliánwǎng".
english: "WiFi" is a common abbreviation used in everyday life.

meaning: 1. to exceed by far; 2. to outclass
sentence: 他的成绩远超过班里其他同学。
pinyin: Tā de chéngjì yuǎn chāoguò bān lǐ qítā tóngxué.
english: His grades far exceed those of other classmates in the class.

sentence: 厨房的管路堵了，需要修一下。
pinyin: Chúfáng de guǎnlù dǔ le, xūyào xiū yīxià.
english: The kitchen pipes are clogged and need to be fixed.

sentence: 目击者提供了关键证词。
pinyin: Mùjīzhě tígōng le guānjiàn zhèngcí.
english: The eyewitness provided key testimony.

sentence: 这道题需要先求出摩擦系数。
pinyin: Zhè dào tí xūyào xiān qiúchū mócā xìshù.
english: This problem requires finding the coefficient of friction first.

meaning: 1. to establish; 2. to set (a new record)
sentence: 她创下了新的世界纪录。
pinyin: Tā chuàngxià le xīn de shìjiè jìlù.
english: She set a new world record.

sentence: 他被判处三年有期徒刑。
pinyin: Tā bèi pànchǔ sān nián yǒuqī túxíng.
english: He was sentenced to three years in prison.

sentence: 了解历史背景有助于理解这篇文章。
pinyin: Liǎojiě lìshǐ bèijǐng yǒuzhù yú lǐjiě zhè piān wénzhāng.
english: Understanding the historical background helps you understand this article.

sentence: 总公司在上海，分公司在各地。
pinyin: Zǒng gōngsī zài Shànghǎi, fēn gōngsī zài gè dì.
english: The head office is in Shanghai, with branch offices everywhere.

meaning: 1. to look exactly like; 2. to be the spitting image of
sentence: 他穿上那件衣服活像个明星。
pinyin: Tā chuān shàng nà jiàn yīfu huóxiàng gè míngxīng.
english: He looks exactly like a celebrity when he puts on that outfit.

sentence: 生物课上我们学习了植物的生殖方式。
pinyin: Shēngwù kè shàng wǒmen xuéxí le zhíwù de shēngzhí fāngshì.
english: In biology class we learned about the reproduction methods of plants.

meaning: national security (abbr. for 國家安全|国家安全[guo2 jia1 an1 quan2]); national
sentence: 这个部门负责处理国安相关事务。
pinyin: Zhè ge bù mén fù zé chǔ lǐ guó ān xiāng guān shì wù.
english: This department is responsible for handling national security matters.

sentence: 现代农业越来越注重集约经营。
pinyin: Xiàn dài nóng yè yuè lái yuè zhù zhòng jí yuē jīng yíng.
english: Modern agriculture pays more and more attention to intensive management.

sentence: 这家工厂扩建后产能提高了一倍。
pinyin: Zhè jiā gōng chǎng kuò jiàn hòu chǎn néng tí gāo le yī bèi.
english: After the factory's expansion, its production capacity doubled.

meaning: to authorize; to investigate then ratify
sentence: 这个项目已经经过相关部门核准。
pinyin: Zhè ge xiàng mù yǐ jīng jīng guò xiāng guān bù mén hé zhǔn.
english: This project has already been authorized by the relevant departments.

meaning: extent of a rise (in prices etc); amount of increase; growth (typicall
sentence: 上个月房价的涨幅控制在百分之二以内。
pinyin: Shàng ge yuè fáng jià de zhǎng fú kòng zhì zài bǎi fēn zhī èr yǐ nèi.
english: Last month's increase in housing prices was kept within two percent.
